request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Prove the assay-management platform eliminates a genuinely painful workflow before scaling sales.","applies_because":"The pitch licenses a wet-lab assay-management platform to academic spinouts and small CROs — a niche where workflow pain must be demonstrably acute or buyers will not switch from spreadsheets/LIMS.","raised_by":["knewton::edtech"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Avoid over-concentrating revenue in a handful of large academic or CRO anchor customers.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly targets academic spinouts and small CROs, a narrow customer segment where a few logos could represent the majority of ARR, creating dangerous concentration risk.","raised_by":["knewton::edtech"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Keep monetization and cost structure aligned; price to capture real value from day one.","applies_because":"A B2B SaaS licensed to cash-constrained academic spinouts risks underpricing, making it hard to cover platform infrastructure costs and achieve a viable unit economics model.","raised_by":["knewton::edtech"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Stay laser-focused on platform licensing; resist expanding into adjacent lab services or content.","applies_because":"The pitch positions itself as a platform licensor — any drift into managing assay data services or consulting would replicate Knewton's fatal pivot that confused positioning and diluted engineering.","raised_by":["knewton::edtech"],"severity":"medium"}],"injection_detected":false}
